title: Senior UX Designer (AI/ML Products)
companyDescription: Cognita Labs is a Series B AI startup building conversational AI tools for enterprise knowledge management. Backed by a16z and Sequoia. Team of 80, growing fast.
description:
Cognita Labs is building the future of enterprise knowledge work. Our AI assistant helps teams search, summarize, and connect organizational knowledge — but instead of just returning search results, it understands context, reasons through problems, and proactively surfaces relevant information.

We're looking for a senior UX designer who can design the interface and interaction model for our AI-powered knowledge assistant. This isn't a chatbot — it's an autonomous agent that reads, understands, and acts on your company's documents. You'll design how users interact with that agent, how it communicates its reasoning, and how it handles uncertainty.

You'll work closely with our ML engineers and product team to design agent behavior, conversation flows, and trust signals. You'll own the full design process from research to prototype to shipped feature.
responsibilities: Design the end-to-end user experience for our AI knowledge assistant, including conversation flows, output presentation, and agent reasoning transparency
Create and iterate on agent behavior specifications — prompts, constraints, and decision frameworks that shape how the AI responds
Conduct user research with enterprise customers to understand how they interact with AI tools and what trust signals they need
Build high-fidelity prototypes in Figma and test them with real users
Define and maintain the design system for AI interactions, including patterns for confidence indicators, error states, and clarification requests
Collaborate with engineering to ship features and iterate based on user data
Mentor junior designers and contribute to hiring
requirements: 5+ years of product design experience, with at least 2 years designing AI/ML-powered products
Strong portfolio demonstrating complex interaction design, not just visual design
Experience designing conversation flows and understanding of conversation design principles
Proficiency in Figma and prototyping tools
Ability to translate ML capabilities into user-centered design decisions
Excellent communication skills — you can explain design rationale to engineers and business stakeholders
Self-starter who thrives in a fast-moving startup environment
niceToHave: Experience with prompt design or AI agent behavior specification
Background in UX research with AI products
Technical background or ability to read technical documentation
Public writing or speaking about AI design
